summary: L-028 H2 framing fix did NOT resolve the failure. Browser still receives '(failed) 0.0 kB' Doc requests with 0 response headers (HTTP/2 stream reset / RST_STREAM). ServiceWorker fallback served standard Notion AI UI from cache; no warning HTML rendered, no Korean warning text, tab title remains 'Notion AI | Notion'. Behavior is identical to #720 — the explicit convert_to_http2_response with is_http2=0 (V7-E pattern) applied to V6-E did not fix the wire-byte framing problem.

fix_under_test.name: V6-E + L-028 H2 framing fix
fix_under_test.description: explicit convert_to_http2_response with is_http2=0 in page_inject_h2 (V7-E pattern applied to V6-E)

test_steps.2_submit_pii: Typed PII prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
test_steps.3_v6a_block: URL changed to /chat?t=3599aa2d8bdd80018a8d00a9c7d5f46c&wfv=chat. Right pane stayed empty (no AI streaming). Sidebar did NOT show new chat entry → APF V6-A NDJSON block fired correctly at submit-time.
test_steps.4_hard_reload: Pressed Ctrl+Shift+R → fresh H2 connection initiated.
test_steps.5_v6e_query: SPA fetched /chat?t=3599aa2d8bdd80018a8d00a9c7d5f46c&wfv=chat → V6-E query_h2 expected to fire → page_inject_h2 expected to emit warning HTML.

doc_filter_rows_after_reload.name: chat?t=3599aa2d8bdd80018a8...
doc_filter_rows_after_reload.note: ServiceWorker fallback — served Notion AI UI from cache, NOT warning HTML

failed_doc_inspection.response_body: Failed to load response data — No resource with given identifier found
failed_doc_inspection.interpretation: Server-side stream was reset before any HEADERS frame reached the browser. Indicates HTTP/2 protocol-level RST_STREAM (PROTOCOL_ERROR or similar). L-028 fix did NOT prevent the stream tear-down.

network_observations.service_worker_content: Standard Notion AI shell UI (cached aif-production.html)

dom_scan.body_snippet: 콘텐츠로 건너뛰기 최장희's Space 홈 채팅 회의 수신함 Notion AI Notion AI 새 에이전트 오늘 작업 트래커 만들기 15분 어제 새 AI 채팅 9시간 새 채팅 Ctrl+O AI에게 질문하기 자동
dom_scan.interpretation: Standard Notion sidebar + chat input UI. Identical to a normal logged-in Notion session. No warning panel, no APF marker, no Korean keyword 보안/차단/경고/위험.

notion_runtime_errors: opfs-sahpool createSyncAccessHandle NoModificationAllowedError (multiple — pre-existing Notion issue)
Uncaught (in promise) Error: Failed to load a required record: user_root, 356d872b-594c-8152-a77d-00025150fd17, undefined (loadRecordModel — pre-existing)
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'setState') (ClientFramework — pre-existing)
console_observations.interpretation: All console errors are pre-existing Notion runtime errors (opfs storage + record-load failures). Nothing APF-specific (no [APF:H2_RESP] visible client-side, which is expected — server-side log).

comparison_vs_720.720_dom: Notion AI UI rendered, koreanWarning: false, body length 233 chars
comparison_vs_720.721_dom: Notion AI UI rendered, koreanWarning: false, body length 118 chars
comparison_vs_720.delta: IDENTICAL outcome. The L-028 H2 framing fix (explicit convert_to_http2_response is_http2=0) did not change the browser-observable behavior. Stream is still being torn down before any response headers reach the browser. Either: (a) the convert_to_http2_response call is not being reached on this code path, (b) the H2 framer is still emitting HTTP/1.1 wire bytes downstream of that call, (c) a different layer (proxy/upstream) is RST'ing the stream.

block_signal_at_submit.verdict: V6-A submit-time block confirmed (no AI response, no chat history entry)

next_diagnostic_recommendations: Check etap server logs for [APF:H2_RESP] or page_inject_h2 path: confirm whether convert_to_http2_response(is_http2=0) is actually being called on /chat?t=... requests in this build (run_id 20260507-094141-98947).
Verify build artifact actually contains the new V6-E patch — re-check binary timestamp / symbol / changed code path.

Inspect HTTP/2 framer: even with is_http2=0 set on the response object, downstream H2 wire emitter may still be writing :status from a different code path or skipping HEADERS frame entirely (RST_STREAM occurring before HEADERS).
Capture wireshark/tcpdump of the failed request to see actual H2 frames (HEADERS vs RST_STREAM with which error code).

Consider whether ServiceWorker registration itself is the right intervention point — even if H2 framing is fixed, SW will keep serving cached Notion shell on every reload until SW unregisters or warning response includes proper SW-bypass headers.
